title: Indulgent Canadian Chicken Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Canadian dish made with chicken, lime, and spices, cooked to perfection in a traditional clay tajine vessel, this recipe is a low-fat friendly and indulgent treat for any occasion, allowing for a period of rest to enhance the flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay tajine vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the vessel and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the vessel and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken pieces to the vessel and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the vessel and stir to combine.
Add the lime juice and chicken broth to the vessel and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and allow the tagine to simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Add the chopped dried apricots to the vessel and continue to simmer, covered, for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the vessel from the heat and allow the tagine to rest, covered, for 10 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
